note: These prompts are intentionally tool-neutral. Prompt Room should later convert them into ComfyUI-ready prompts with model, sampler, node, and resolution details.
global_prompt_prefix: Vertical 9:16 cinematic reference image for a grounded eastern epic fantasy short drama, restrained magic, worn materials, controlled lighting, realistic fabric and stone texture, no modern objects, no neon, no xianxia immortal glamour.
global_negative_prompt: modern clothing, modern weapons, sci-fi neon, clean game armor, overpowered magic, full angel wings, pristine palace fantasy, cute cartoon style, excessive crowd, complete battlefield panorama

style_prompts.prompt: A vertical mood board showing the visual world of Severed Homeland: old white stone relics partly covered by insect wax, Qingming white register and pale needle, burned village ash, gray-brown hunter cloth, black stone border wall in snow, moon-white treaty platform, short gold-red residual route lines. Grounded cinematic, restrained, weathered, tragic.

style_prompts.purpose: Qingming Court material and color reference
style_prompts.prompt: A clean cold visual board for Sumin Qingming Court: insect-wax white walls, black sun insignia, honeycomb memory cells, white register, translucent wing membrane fabric, pale wax needle tray, symmetrical corridor, bureaucratic violence, cold gray shadows.

style_prompts.purpose: border wall material and color reference
style_prompts.prompt: A rough cold visual board for the northern border wall: black stone gate, old iron, bone bell, gray repaired cloth, snow and wind, dry dark blood marks, reversed torn Sun-Moon cloth, exhausted human military household atmosphere.

character_prompts.prompt: Shen Weisang, 17-year-old lean hunter and fugitive guide, gray-brown worn hunter clothing, leather wrist guards, short boots, hunter bow and short knife, half broken Sun-Moon relay token in hand, left shoulder old injury, charred hem after village fire, guarded eyes, gold-red residual marks only faintly at eye corner and shoulder blade. Front, side, three-quarter, full body design sheet.

Yan Nanzhi, 18-year-old old imperial branch bloodline escapee, black hair tied with southern red cord, coarse travel robe over hidden fine Sun-Moon patterned inner layer, moon-white jade piece, oil-paper wrapped blood treaty fragments, calm disciplined eyes, restrained noble posture under fugitive disguise. Front, side, three-quarter, full body design sheet.

Bai Yi, Sumin Qingming inspector, tall still silhouette, spotless white official robe, translucent insect-wing shoulder mantle, pale expressionless face mask with dark compound-eye texture near the eyes, small black sun insignia, insect-wax needle and white register, clean cold bureaucratic menace, partial insect traits only. Front, side, three-quarter, inspection pose.

Shen Zhaomian child character sheet with two states: village child with simple gray cloth, small herb pouch, burned hair cord; Qingming identifier state with white child robe, insect-wax wrist ring, same childhood anchor retained, sensitive eyes with brief memory flicker. Institutional trauma, not villain glamour.

Lu Qingli, teenage wallfoot mixed-heritage girl, compact fast survivor, gray-blue short jacket, patched underlayers, rope belt, shard pottery charm, hidden narrow knife, black market wood pass, subtle insect-scale trace behind ear only visible in close-up, wary half-smile, always near exits. Front, side, full body, knife action.

Xue Linqiang, old border wall master, broad worn soldier posture, gray-stone old armor pieces, coarse repaired wall cloth, frost-cracked fingers, bone whistle, worn long spear, reversed old Sun-Moon cloth strip at waist, practical and exhausted, not noble. Front, side, full body, wall guard pose.

location_prompts.prompt: Canyang Ao old relay village board: low earth walls, old well, village medicine house, hunter bow rack, sunset valley, insect-wax sealed door plaque, hidden relay sign under ordinary life, later fire ash and burned beams. Show village gate, medicine house interior, old well, burned aftermath.

Old imperial relay tunnel board: narrow underground white stone archway, peeled Sun-Moon seals, route grid carvings, torch darkness, short broken gold-red residual light lines on the floor, practical hidden infrastructure, not grand palace.

Qingming Court outer office board: spotless white corridors, white register desk, pale insect-wax needle tray, honeycomb memory cells, children in white training robes, cold symmetrical bureaucratic violence, black ink and bone-white materials.

Suohou Pass board: black stone border wall gate in snow, peeling Sumin black-sun insignia revealing old Sun-Moon array base underneath, bone bell, old iron gate, snow-night torchlight, distant giant beast impact shown through shadow and gate vibration.

Moon Oath old relay chamber board: underground star-chart hall, moon-white stone treaty platform, damaged treaty pages, multiple faction seals, cracked Sun-Moon mark, deep shadow, dust and collapse cracks, victory incomplete after main scroll burns.

prop_prompts.prompt: Core prop board for Severed Homeland: half broken Sun-Moon relay token in worn bronze and old white stone, moon-white jade shard on red cord, Qingming white register, pale insect-wax needle, thin Qingming incense smoke trace, torn old relay map, oil-paper blood treaty fragments, burned Moon Oath treaty page with multiple faction seals. Each prop isolated and labeled visually by material.

Border wall and wallfoot prop board: bone whistle, longer northern bone flute, dull yellow-gray food token, dark wood black-market pass with route notch, reversed torn Sun-Moon cloth strip, shard pottery charm, old iron gate token. Weathered, practical, cold, no shiny treasure.

blocked.reason: User requested the project-level visual unity package. Actual image generation has not been requested and should wait for approval or director-room outputs.
